本次对应说明（问题+修复）：

- 问题出在哪里：集群页面 loading 态用了两段式骨架，视觉上被切成上下两块；侧边栏缺少回到首页的快捷入口。

已检查这两个改动文件的 lint，当前无新增报错。

{
  "name": "左下浮窗入口方案",
  "overview": "在全站增加左下角悬浮圆点，hover 可展开信息面板，面板包含火山引擎登录指引与待实现功能列表。方案以低侵入方式接入根布局，保证样式统一与可维护性。",
  "plan": "# 左下悬浮面板实现方案\n\n## 目标与范围\n- 在全站页面左下角新增悬浮圆点（半径 15px，即直径 30px）。\n- 鼠标 hover 圆点后显示信息面板；鼠标移入面板区域时保持展开，移出后关闭。\n- 面板分两部分：\n  - 火山引擎-容器服务说明 + 一个带边框的信息块（含用户名/密码说明、登录步骤、登录页新窗口链接）\n  - 待实现功能列表（3 条）\n\n## 实现位置\n- 在根布局挂载全局组件，确保“全站可见”：\n  - [d:\\code\\cluster-dashboard\\src\\app\\layout.tsx](d:\\code\\cluster-dashboard\\src\\app\\layout.tsx)\n- 新增独立组件承载交互与内容，避免污染现有布局逻辑：\n  - [d:\\code\\cluster-dashboard\\src\\components\\common\\FloatingInfoDot.tsx](d:\\code\\cluster-dashboard\\src\\components\\common\\FloatingInfoDot.tsx)\n\n## 组件与交互设计\n- 圆点样式\n  - &#96;position: fixed; left: 24px; bottom: 24px; width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: 50%&#96;\n  - 使用项目现有 Ant Design 风格（如轻阴影、主题色背景）保持一致性。\n- 展开逻辑\n  - 使用组件内部 &#96;useState&#96; 控制 &#96;open&#96;。\n  - 圆点 &#96;onMouseEnter&#96; 打开；容器（圆点+面板包裹层）&#96;onMouseLeave&#96; 关闭。\n  - 面板与圆点置于同一 hover 区域，满足“移入面板保持展开”。\n- 面板内容\n  - 第一部分标题：&#96;火山引擎-容器服务&#96;\n  - 文案：说明 k8s 集群部署在火山引擎，可登录控制台查看。\n  - 登录步骤区块（带边框容器）：\n    - 进入登录页面，然后输入：\n    - 用户名：&#96;visit_zxl&#96;\n    - 密码：&#96;1234_qweR&#96;\n    - 登录后点击容器服务即可查看\n    - 登录页面链接：&#96;https://console.volcengine.com/auth/login/user/2000010275&#96;（新窗口打开，带 &#96;rel=\"noopener noreferrer\"&#96;）\n  - 第二部分标题：&#96;待实现功能&#96;\n  - 列表：\n    1. 资源的更新、删除功能\n    2. auth功能\n    3. AI对话功能\n\n## 技术细节\n- 优先使用 Ant Design 组件（&#96;Card&#96; / &#96;Typography&#96; / &#96;Divider&#96; / &#96;Button&#96; 或 &#96;List&#96;）组合实现，减少自定义样式复杂度。\n- 组件保持 &#96;\"use client\"&#96;，避免服务端渲染事件限制。\n- &#96;z-index&#96; 设为较高值，防止被页面内容覆盖。\n- 面板宽度控制在约 &#96;320px&#96;，小屏可适当收窄（如 &#96;maxWidth: calc(100vw - 32px)&#96;）。\n\n## 验证清单\n- 全站任意页面均可见圆点。\n- hover 圆点时面板出现；鼠标移动到面板内不关闭；移出整体区域关闭。\n- 登录链接点击后新开窗口。\n- 面板两部分内容和文案与需求一致。\n- 不影响现有页面交互（侧边栏、表单、弹窗等）。",
  "todos": [
    {
      "content": "新增 FloatingInfoDot 组件并实现圆点/面板 hover 交互与面板内容",
      "id": "add-floating-component",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "在根布局 layout.tsx 挂载组件，保证全站显示",
      "id": "mount-in-root-layout",
      "status": "pending"
    },
    {
      "content": "检查样式层级、可读性、链接新窗口安全属性与基础交互稳定性",
      "id": "ui-and-accessibility-check",

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The FloatingInfoDot can use either useTheme for dark/light styling or Ant Design Card inside ConfigProvider. If mounted inside ThemeProvider, antd components will function properly.

- It can utilize useTheme for styling
- Alternatively, it can use Ant Design Card within ConfigProvider
- Mounting inside ThemeProvider ensures antd components work correctly The FloatingInfoDot component must be implemented as a client component and integrated into the layout within a ThemeProvider for proper styling. It uses Ant Design's Card component through ConfigProvider and leverages useTheme for dark/light mode support.

- Component structure includes state management for open/closed states
- Uses mouse events to control visibility
- Integrates with ThemeProvider for consistent styling
- Implements Ant Design components via ConfigProvider
- Utilizes useTheme for theme-aware styling The FloatingInfoDot is styled with fixed positioning at the bottom-left corner, using flexbox for layout. It includes a button with primary color background, circular shape, and shadow effect for visual prominence. The button features accessibility attributes and hover/click interactions to toggle visibility.

- Positioned fixed at left: 24px and bottom: 24px
- Uses flexbox for column layout and start alignment
- Button has circular shape (border-radius: 50%)
- Primary color background with shadow effect
- Accessibility attributes included (aria-expanded, aria-haspopup)
- Interactive state changes on click/hover The FloatingInfoDot component includes an aria-label for accessibility and conditionally renders a Card component when open. The Card is styled with a fixed width, max width, and specific margin. It is positioned visually above the dot using order property, despite being in a flex column layout aligned to the start. The layout uses flex column direction with alignItems set to flex-start, placing the dot at the bottom. If the panel is placed as the first child with order -1, it will appear visually above the dot, which is ideal for hover effects coming from below. In a flex column layout, the first item appears at the top of the container, and since the container is anchored at the bottom-left corner with fixed positioning (bottom: 24), the card will visually appear above the dot. This arrangement works well for the intended interaction pattern. The FloatingInfoDot component uses fixed positioning at bottom: 24px and left: 24px, with a flex column layout aligned to the start. The Card component is placed first in the DOM order, followed by the dot button, ensuring it appears visually above the dot due to the flex layout. This arrangement allows the panel to display above the dot when open, with the dot positioned at the bottom-left corner.

- Card is rendered first in DOM order
- Dot button follows in DOM order
- Fixed positioning at bottom: 24px and left: 24px
- Flex column layout with start alignment
- Panel appears above dot due to flex ordering

For accessibility, a button element is used for the dot with appropriate ARIA attributes and keyboard support. The component maintains hover behavior for opening the panel, with no additional click-to-toggle functionality unless explicitly enhanced later. The design prioritizes hover interactions for panel visibility while ensuring proper focus handling for keyboard users.

- OnFocus can open the panel, enhancing accessibility even if not initially required. ARIA controls attribute will be added if the panel is given an ID. onBlur with delay is optional but adds complexity.

For content structure:

- Title: -
- Kubernetes on Volcengine description
- Bordered section with steps, credentials, and external link

Implementation details:

- Use Ant Design Typography.Title level 5, Text, and Link components
- For external links, use `<a href={...} target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">`
- For internal links, Ant Design Link component will use next/link
- Bordered section will contain steps, credentials, and link elements</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

原因找到了：**不是服务没启动，而是首页请求卡住了**。

我这边排查结果：

- `3001` 端口在监听，Next.js 进程正常运行。
- 静态资源 `http://127.0.0.1:3001/icon.svg` 可正常返回 `200`，说明服务可访问。
- 但访问 `/` 会超时，且日志停在 `Compiling / ...`。
- 首页代码 `src/app/page.tsx` 在服务端会直接调用火山引擎 `ListClusters`（`@volcengine/openapi`），当前这个请求没有超时控制，网络/鉴权异常时会把首屏卡住。

**结论**：浏览器“访问不了”本质是首页 SSR 被外部接口阻塞，不是本地 dev server 挂了。

如果你愿意，我可以马上帮你改一版“兜底”：

- 给 `ListClusters` 加超时（例如 5-8 秒）；
- 超时或失败时直接返回空列表，让首页先能打开。

---

_**User**_

在侧边栏上面加一个返回按钮，可以返回首页

---

_**User**_

To start counting visitors and page views, follow these steps.

Next.js
1

Install our package

Start by installing @vercel/analytics in your existing project.
npm
yarn
pnpm

npm i @vercel/analytics
2

Add the React component
Import and use the <Analytics/> React component into your app's layout.

import { Analytics } from "@vercel/analytics/next"
For full examples and further reference, please refer to our documentation
3

Deploy & Visit your Site

Deploy your changes and visit the deployment to collect your page views.

If you don't see data after 30 seconds, please check for content blockers and try to navigate between pages on your site.

已按你的接入步骤完成前两步：

- 已安装依赖：`@vercel/analytics`
- 已在根布局接入组件：`src/app/layout.tsx`

接下来你只需要：

1. 部署最新代码（Vercel）
2. 打开部署后的站点并浏览几个页面
